Right handed: I am, in fact,
Patient Specific Notes: Bruce presents today for preoperative visit. He is scheduled for a
right anatomic total shoulder on April 17th at iOS. All questions regarding surgery were
answered. He was provided with a sling and post op pain medication. He will follow up 2
weeks after his surgery. He has an intact rotator cuff on MRI.
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
The right shoulder was braced with a ultrasling, Shoulder orthosis, abduction.
I recommend continued use of the orthosis until next follow up.
